## Checklist

- [ ] I tested `statusline.js` with mock input (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)) and it renders correctly.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies were added — the project is intentionally dependency-free.
- [ ] If I changed the README images, I ran `node tools/render-svg.js` and committed the result.
- [ ] New segments degrade gracefully when their data field is absent (like `rate` / `diff`).
